channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Nearly three in four US scam victims report mental health harm, poll finds
item.description: Gallup survey says the financial toll of scams in the United States in 2025 was estimated at $68bn.

item.title: Two UK police officers face misconduct probe in Henry Nowak murder case
item.description: IOPC says it is investigating whether race or religion impacted any of the officers' actions.

item.title: Trump made $1.4B from crypto ventures in first year back in office
item.description: Trump's latest 2025 financial disclosure reveals he made more than $1.4B in income from crypto ventures.

item.title: ‘We can relate’: Bosnia fans bring passion, Palestine support, to World Cup
item.description: Tournament has placed Bosnia's fans and global diaspora in the spotlight, as team fights to reach Round of 16.

item.title: Orange lava flows stream from Mount Etna
item.description: Orange lava flows stream from Mount Etna

item.title: USA vs Bosnia-Herzegovina: World Cup Round of 32: Prediction, team lineups
item.description: Buoyed by a dream run, underdogs Bosnia and Herzegovina clash with cohosts USA in their first World Cup knockout game.

item.title: In Pictures: Mexico celebrates historic World Cup victory
item.description: Fireworks light up Mexico’s cities as fans toast historic knockout-round win and dream of a deeper run ahead.

item.title: Russian attacks kill three in Ukraine as Kyiv hits another oil refinery
item.description: President Zelenskyy says Ukraine is expanding its long-range drone campaign with new strikes deep inside Russia.

item.title: The Possibilist | Ep 8
item.description: Veteran mediator William Ury reflects on how the fine art of diplomacy is essential at holding the world together.

item.title: Venezuelan sky turns deep red as sun sets over Caracas
item.description: Venezuelan sky turns deep red as sun sets over Caracas

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 20: France dominates Sweden; Mexico, Norway progress
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: US-Iran negotiations: What’s the latest?
item.description: Iranian officials are expected in Doha for talks with Qatari mediators, a day after US negotiators arrived there.

item.title: Rescuers race to reach survivors in Venezuela
item.description: "I'm still begging for people to help me get him out."

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Wednesday schedule, predictions and bracket update
item.description: England, Argentina and Belgium chase round of 16 spots as World Cup underdogs eye historic upsets.

item.title: Trump official says White House will fight birthright citizenship decision
item.description: A White House adviser told Al Jazeera the Trump administration will continue ‘fighting’ to end birthright citizenship.

item.title: The Lebanon-Israel agreement is paving the way for the next war
item.description: And the agreement has ensured that Lebanon will be blamed for it.

item.title: Pakistan says it intercepted four drones fired from Afghanistan
item.description: Afghan defence ministry says it carried out 'air strikes' in Pakistan's Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa provinces.

item.title: Africa can finally mine, beneficiate and industrialise on its own terms
item.description: From Kenya to Ghana to Mali, governments are insisting their minerals be processed at home before they leave.

item.title: Democratic socialist Kiros defeats longtime incumbent in Colorado primary
item.description: Former lawyer Melat Kiros, 29, has criticised Democrats for support of Israel during its genocidal war on Gaza.

item.title: ‘I did nothing wrong’: Sweden’s migration regime hardens, upending lives
item.description: Once a European nation receiving large numbers of refugees and migrants, Sweden completes a decade-long overhaul.

item.title: Why is MAGA in meltdown over the Supreme Court birthright ruling?
item.description: The US Supreme Court has rejected Trump’s bid to stop the children of some immigrants obtaining US citizenship at birth.

item.title: Gojek co-founder, turned Indonesian Education Minister jailed for 10 years
item.description: Gojek co-founder and former Education Minister Nadiem Makarim has been sentenced to 10 years in prison.

item.title: Tutoring centre roof collapses killing 14 children in Pakistan
item.description: At least 14 children were killed when the roof of a private tutoring centre collapsed outside Lahore, Pakistan.

item.title: Supreme Court’s divided ruling on birthright citizenship may be revisited
item.description: The Supreme Court’s 6-3 ruling on birthright citizenship could signal that the issue could return to the Court.

item.title: World’s oceans experience hottest June ever, scientists say more heat ahead
item.description: European Union monitors say the first half of 2026 was 'marked by sustained and exceptional ocean warmth'.
